Package mru.store.controller

Class StoreManager

java.lang.Object
mru.store.controller.StoreManager
public class StoreManager extends Object
This class represents the coordination of the view and model classes to create a functional store.
Author:
kaydence eng, xavier yick

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    StoreManager()
    This method is the constructor to initialize toyList, appMenu, and scanner.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    addToy()
    This methods adds a new toy based on user input.
    void
    launchApplication()
    This method launches the application.
    private void
    loadData()
    This method reads toys.txt and loads it into an array list of toys.
    void
    mainMenu()
    This method displays the main menu and takes in user input for what they want to do.
    void
    removeToy()
    This method removes a toy based on a serial number.
    void
    save()
    This method saves user changes back into the toys.txt database.
    private void
    searchBySerialNumber(String serialNumber)
    This method searches the database using a serial number and prompts the user if they want to purchase a toy.
    private void
    searchByToyName(String searchToyName)
    This method searches the database according to user inputed string, returns the search results, and prompts the user what toy they want to purchase.
    private void
    searchByToyType(int searchToyType)
    This method searches the database based on the type of toy the user inputed, returns search results, and prompts the user if they want to purchase a toy.
    void
    searchInventory()
    This method displays the menu to search for toys and takes user input to determine what way we are going to look for toys.

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • StoreManager

      public StoreManager()
      This method is the constructor to initialize toyList, appMenu, and scanner. It loads in the database and launches the application.

  • Method Details

    • launchApplication

      public void launchApplication()
      This method launches the application.

    • mainMenu

      public void mainMenu()
      This method displays the main menu and takes in user input for what they want to do.

    • searchInventory

      public void searchInventory()
      This method displays the menu to search for toys and takes user input to determine what way we are going to look for toys.

    • addToy

      public void addToy() throws CustomException
      This methods adds a new toy based on user input.
      Throws:
      CustomException

    • removeToy

      public void removeToy()
      This method removes a toy based on a serial number.

    • searchBySerialNumber

      private void searchBySerialNumber(String serialNumber)
      This method searches the database using a serial number and prompts the user if they want to purchase a toy.
      Parameters:
      serialNumber -

    • searchByToyName

      private void searchByToyName(String searchToyName)
      This method searches the database according to user inputed string, returns the search results, and prompts the user what toy they want to purchase.
      Parameters:
      searchToyName -

    • searchByToyType

      private void searchByToyType(int searchToyType)
      This method searches the database based on the type of toy the user inputed, returns search results, and prompts the user if they want to purchase a toy.
      Parameters:
      searchToyType -

    • save

      public void save() throws Exception
      This method saves user changes back into the toys.txt database.
      Throws:
      Exception

    • loadData

      private void loadData() throws Exception
      This method reads toys.txt and loads it into an array list of toys.
      Throws:
      Exception
